circlet.name: Pendulum That Ceased Amidst a Great Fall

plume.name: Sharpness That Ceased Upon Wondrous Creation

sands.name: Moment That Ceased Upon Waking From Grand Dreams

setBonuses.4pc: Increases Superconduct Reaction DMG by 80% and Stellar-Conduct Reaction DMG by 40%. When the wielder attacks opponents affected by Superconduct or Stellar-Conduct, this attack's CRIT Rate is increased by 16%.
